printed.name: Bottom Lift with RUBar
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, arms straight and shoulder width apart, hands holding RUBar, hips externally rotated, legs straight and together, feet dorsiflexed and placed on trapeze strap

movement.exhale: Roll pelvis and spine up, simultaneously move RUBar toward thighs / Roll spine and pelvis down, simultaneously move RUBar up, return to start position

cues: Establish straight diagonal line in top position
